summary: Independent QA review accepts the process-only lead transition: one active lead is recorded as thread 019eff50-c69d-7612-a90b-7024a47e0af5, the outgoing lead remains retired with null thread id not fabricated, goal mode remains enabled for M3 with Human Gate false, and no business code changes were detected.

tests_run.result: Branch chore/lead-transition-accept; tracked changes limited to process/status files and M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001.json, with LEAD-TRANSITION-ACCEPT-001.json and LEAD-TRANSITION-PREPARE-001__ACK.json untracked before this QA handoff.

Tracked diff only: project/goal-mode-state.json; project/messages/outbox/GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION.json; project/model-routing-state.json; project/tasks/active/M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001.json; project/tasks/thread-registry.json.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON.parse check for specified transition/state/task JSON files
tests_run.result: Parsed LEAD-TRANSITION-PREPARE-001.json, GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION.json, LEAD-TRANSITION-ACCEPT-001.json, LEAD-TRANSITION-PREPARE-001__ACK.json, goal-mode-state.json, model-routing-state.json, thread-registry.json, and M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001.json.
Task graph listed successfully; CLOSED tasks remain CLOSED and M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001 is the READY task.
goal-mode, model-routing, and thread-registry all identify exactly one active lead: 019eff50-c69d-7612-a90b-7024a47e0af5; outgoing lead is retired_closed with thread_id null.
Prepared handoff main_commit is an ancestor of current HEAD.
Prepared handoff main_commit is an ancestor of origin/main.
Goal-mode continuation file exists in origin/main.
Only project/tasks/active/M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001.json is modified in these paths; no packages/apps/docs business-code changes.

decisions: ACCEPT: LEAD-TRANSITION-ACCEPT-001 satisfies the process-only leadership transition acceptance criteria.
Outgoing thread id remains null because LEAD-TRANSITION-PREPARE-001 did not expose a reliable outgoing thread id.
M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001 may remain READY for normal lead-owned kickoff after this process transition is integrated.
risks: The project-git-workflow Status.cmd wrapper is not initialized in this repository; the review used native read-only git commands instead.
The acceptance and acknowledgement files are still working-tree artifacts until the lead integrates this process transition.
requested_action: Integrate the accepted process transition, commit and push the allowed process/status/message files, then continue with the normal M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001 workflow after integration.
